recommendation_policy_conflicts.exact_conflicting_semantics: ai_safety_policy prohibits recommendations completely. M8R-05A ensures canonical project output has no recommendations, but AI is permitted to generate them based on conversation.
recommendation_policy_conflicts.reason: Separates canonical source generation from AI LLM policy.
recommendation_policy_conflicts.migration_action: Update ai_safety_policy.md to specify constraint applies to canonical project execution only.

smallest_sufficient_conflicts.exact_conflicting_semantics: SKILL.md advises smallest sufficient capabilities. M8R-05A says exhaustive within authorized scope.
smallest_sufficient_conflicts.migration_action: Remove smallest sufficient wording from SKILL.

fixed_taxonomy_conflicts.exact_conflicting_semantics: M5F/M5I/M5J-centric agent workflow with old canonical package entrypoint and blanket recommendation boundary.
M8R-03B relies on quick/standard/deep evidence depth. Phase B relies on fixed AI operation limits.
fixed_taxonomy_conflicts.reason: M8R-05A abstracts this depth selection into canonical execution.
fixed_taxonomy_conflicts.migration_action: Separate M8R-03B concepts from Phase B issues. Reinterpret M8R-03B as legacy mapping.

mode_abc_conflicts.exact_conflicting_semantics: Mode A/B/C is currently a mixed AI/operator workflow.
mode_abc_conflicts.reason: AI does not control operator execution modes. Must purify to operator/frontend workflow.
mode_abc_conflicts.migration_action: Redefine Mode A/B/C as frontend workflow states (Inspect, Preview, Package) and migrate AI vocabulary to Unified Request.

level_12_conflicts.exact_conflicting_semantics: Level 1/2 treated as M5K data layer.
level_12_conflicts.reason: Requires expansion into formal Unified Result lifecycle metadata.
level_12_conflicts.migration_action: Redefine Level 1/2 as result lifecycle metadata rather than AI request parameter.

duplicate_source_of_truth.exact_conflicting_semantics: Both define capabilities in unstructured markdown.
duplicate_source_of_truth.reason: Centralized truth is the canonical instance.
duplicate_source_of_truth.migration_action: Rewrite Quick Guide to be a generated projection of the canonical instance, synced via hash-bound test.
